capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a Business Continuity Management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have a Business Continuity Management service.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise business continuity management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the Business Continuity Management service reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Is the Business Continuity Management service reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent business continuity management service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the BCP service?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the BCP service.
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for the BCP service

questions.prompt: Are the KPIs and KRIs for the BCP service reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are the KPIs and KRIs for the BCP service reviewed frequently.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent KPI/KRI review for the BCP service

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document business continuity management and operational resilience policies and procedures?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise formalize and document business continuity management and operational resilience policies and procedures.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented business continuity and operational resilience policies and procedures

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise review and update the policies and procedures at least annually?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise review and update the policies and procedures at least annually.
questions.evaluation_focus: Annual or more frequent review and update of policies and procedures

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have strategies to reduce the impact of, withstand, and recover from business disruptions within risk appetite?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have strategies to reduce the impact of, withstand, and recover from business disruptions within risk appetite.
questions.evaluation_focus: Strategies to reduce impact, withstand, and recover from business disruptions within risk appetite

questions.prompt: Does the BCP strategy get reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the BCP strategy get reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document a business continuity plan based on the results of the operational resilience strategies and capabilities?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise formalize and document a business continuity plan based on the results of the operational resilience strategies and capabilities.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented business continuity plan based on operational resilience strategies and capabilities

questions.prompt: How frequently is the business continuity plan reviewed?
questions.intent: Evaluate: How frequently is the business continuity plan reviewed.
questions.evaluation_focus: Defined review cadence for the business continuity plan

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise exercise and test business continuity and operational resilience plans at least annually or upon significant changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise exercise and test business continuity and operational resilience plans at least annually or upon significant changes.
questions.evaluation_focus: Annual or change-triggered exercise and testing of business continuity and operational resilience plans

questions.prompt: Are the business continuity and operational resilience plans reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are the business continuity and operational resilience plans reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent review of business continuity and operational resilience plans for efficacy

questions.prompt: Are business continuity and operational resilience plans and processes automated?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are business continuity and operational resilience plans and processes automated.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automation of business continuity and operational resilience plans and processes

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have communication with stakeholders and participants in the course of business continuity and resilience procedures?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise have communication with stakeholders and participants in the course of business continuity and resilience procedures.
questions.evaluation_focus: Communication with stakeholders and participants during business continuity and resilience procedures

questions.prompt: Are the communication plans reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Are the communication plans reviewed frequently for efficacy.

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document a disaster response plan to recover from natural and man-made disasters?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise formalize and document a disaster response plan to recover from natural and man-made disasters.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented disaster response plan for natural and man-made disasters

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise update the plan at least annually or upon significant changes?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise update the plan at least annually or upon significant changes.
questions.evaluation_focus: Annual or change-triggered update of the disaster response plan

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise exercise the disaster response plan annually or upon significant changes, including if possible local emergency authorities?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise exercise the disaster response plan annually or upon significant changes, including if possible local emergency authorities.
questions.evaluation_focus: Annual or change-triggered disaster response plan exercise including local emergency authorities where possible

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise supplement business-critical equipment with redundant equipment independently located at a reasonable minimum distance in accordance with applicable industry standards?
questions.intent: Evaluate: Does the enterprise supplement business-critical equipment with redundant equipment independently located at a reasonable minimum distance in accordance with applicable industry standards.
questions.evaluation_focus: Redundant business-critical equipment independently located at reasonable minimum distance per industry standards
